title: hotato detached attestation, schema_version 1
description: A detached signature over a canonical subject digest. Makes an unsigned, internally-consistent bundle distinguishable from an authenticated one. Unsigned bundles remain usable but must be called 'unsigned, internally consistent evidence', never 'authenticated'.

subject_digest.description: sha256 over the canonical tuple (contract schema, label + revision, policy + pass conditions, audio + decoded-PCM hashes, frame-evidence hash, scorer package/version, creator identity, timestamp, optional repo commit).
